name: 68Pcs Pink and Purple Balloons 12 Inch Metallic Purple Pink Latex Balloon Confetti ballons with Ribbons Party Balloons for Wedding Girls Birthday Baby Shower Decorations.
bullets: 68 pieces of pink and purple balloons set is easy to create a dreamy scene. Contains 68 pieces of 12 inches latex balloons (including 16 pieces of macaron purple balloons, 16 pieces of macaron pink balloons, 8 pieces of metallic purple balloons, 8 pieces of metallic pink balloons, 10 pieces of purple confetti balloons, 10 pieces of pink confetti balloons, the additional ribbons in the package allows you to easily tie the balloons.

The balloons are made of high quality natural latex: high elasticity cut ductility, inflatable and not easy to burst, can be stretched to 12 inches full and round. Macaron pink and purple advanced color scheme: low saturation and gentle tone, healing atmosphere gods. Sequins evenly suspended, shaking that is scattered river of stars, forever girl heart!

From proposal to party, pink purple balloons contract all your sweet moments, metallic purple balloons paved sequin ball hanging canopies, every step into the romantic wedding/proposal Macaron pink balloons and pink sequin ball embellishments are very suitable for girls' birthday parties, baby showers, and the perfect match of metallic pink purple balloons is the perfect match for business events.

The pink and purple birthday balloon can be inflated with a hand pump (for more accuracy) or helium tank (for levitation effect). The balloon can be filled with air or helium. Squeeze the neck of the balloon and slowly inflate it to a diameter of approx. 30 cm. It is recommended to inflate the metallic balloons by hand, as the helium may reduce the luster of the coating. Best results within 24 hours after inflation, avoid direct sunlight

Friendly Reminder: Purple confetti balloons and pink confetti balloons appear slightly yellowish before being inflated, but become transparent once inflated. See the image for details.If you are confused about our purple and pink balloons, please contact us in time.

reviews.name: Linda Hardy
reviews.title: Perfect Balloons for a Hello Kitty Baby Shower!
reviews.body: These balloons were perfect for my baby shower! They were easy to inflate, made from high-quality material, and featured beautiful, vibrant colors. Assembly was simple, and they added the perfect finishing touch to my Hello Kitty theme.

reviews.name: Kaitlyn Erdman
reviews.title: Would recommend
reviews.body: Great balloons! I didn't even need to use all of them; there were so many. I am, however, still finding those little gold circles from the clear balloons all over my apartment 3 months later, lol. That's also probably because I have cats, with claws, that found and popped most of the balloons after the party, lol. Not the balloon's fault. I would reccommend these balloons. They are easy to blow up; I used a tool for it. They were true to their colors and our theme of black and gold. Other than my cat's claws, they were good quality and durable.

reviews.name: Chieffer
reviews.title: Very nice balloons.
reviews.body: Lots of balloons for the price.  Quality is high and you are able to inflate them easily.  Comes with two roles of streamers to tie them up making it easy to hang them or for holding if you use helium.  Colors were consistent and the ones with confetti inside were the biggest hit.

reviews.name: Reileene T Gilkey
reviews.title: Great variety and quality of balloons!!!
reviews.body: I used these to make a balloon arch for my granddaughters 1st birthday party and they looked fabulous! I had never made an arch before, but these balloons were quality - I did not have one casualty of a balloon popping when creating my arches! They stayed up for a good two days before showing minimal air loss as well! Nice quality/thickness of latex balloon. So easy to blow up and assemble onto my arch! I also loved the variety of balloon colors/style that came in this pack! Awesome purchase- would highly recommend to anyone need balloons for an arch as well as for no arch!
